memories.content: Waves 1-10 property/deal/document CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline: DB 253K records (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod validation (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis Dashboard: 10 endpoints, 6 visualizations, 3-view distribution graphs (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline: 5 DB tables, 6 API clients, scheduler, Leaflet map (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Pipeline: 6 modules, 11 endpoints, 137 tests (2026-02-11). UW Model Phase 3-4: 30 groups, 244 files, field remaps, batch extraction, approval workflow, cross-group validation (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker production config, Technical Debt Cleanup, Market page fixes (2026-02-12). Extraction Hardening + Frontend Accessibility (2026-03-03). Login Flow: zustand authStore, LoginPage, RequireAuth route wrapper, TopNav logout (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction Pipeline: discover_local_deal_files() with STAGE_FOLDER_MAP (2026-03-03). Deals Page Overhaul: 12 UW metric kanban cards, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint links, stat bar, filters, comparison table, auth guards on all deal+property endpoints (2026-03-04, commit 8e2af61). Tests: 1651+ backend + 526 frontend.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Backend port 8000, Frontend port 5173. Dev command: npm run dev:all (concurrent). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock data, NO fake data — show errors instead. User credentials: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / display name 'Matt Borgeson' (admin role). User demands thorough validation — test ALL files. User open to parallel Claude Agent Teams. User wants to review each dashboard page in depth before deployment. User deferred security audit to later — prioritizes visual verification and page reviews first.

pydantic-settings 2.x: CORS_ORIGINS must be JSON array. Single .env in project root, symlinked from backend/.env. Main DB: PostgreSQL localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data. Alembic head: 7c415cc1b77a (activity_logs). SQLite in tests: no server_default, DateTime(timezone=True), datetime.now(UTC). Pre-commit hooks: ruff, ruff-format, mypy. React Rules of Hooks: ALL hooks before conditional returns. Auth: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm requires x-www-form-urlencoded with 'username' field (not 'email'). passlib verify_password crashes with UnknownHashError on invalid hashes — must wrap in try/except. Property name matching: DB stores 'Name (City, ST)', extraction stores 'Name' — use prefix match with ILIKE. Authorization pattern: require_analyst (GET), require_manager (POST/PUT/DELETE). Zod schemas: latitude/longitude are nullable(). WSL→Windows OneDrive filesystem is very slow — use stage_filter to skip dead/realized folders. TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios, has auth interceptor) and src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch, now has auth token injection as of 2026-03-04). Both must attach Bearer token from localStorage.

SHAREPOINT: FILE_PATTERN=.*UW.*Model.*vCurrent.*, CUTOFF_DATE=2024-07-15. LOCAL: LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. STAGE_FOLDER_MAP in common.py maps 6 folder names to DealStage values. discover_local_deal_files(stage_filter) scans with 2-level iterdir (not rglob). Default extraction skips dead/realized for speed. 302 total UW models (287 dead, 10 initial_review, 2 closed, 3 realized). 40 deals + 40 properties in DB. UW GROUPING: 30 active groups (244 files), 9 Proforma deferred. sync_extracted_to_properties(): runs after extraction, accepts property_stages dict, creates Property+Deal for unmatched names, updates existing deal stages. Known: test_parallel_fingerprint_fixtures times out on large XLSB files.

NEXT: Visual verification of Deals page overhaul (npm run dev:all, check kanban cards, stat bar, filters, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint links, auth flow). THEN: Page-by-page review of remaining pages (Properties, Analytics, Market, Sales Analysis, Construction Pipeline, Extraction). THEN: Production hosting (Oracle Cloud Free Tier or Hetzner CX22). FUTURE: UW Model Extraction Phase 4 (per-group dry-run, conflict check), Proforma groups (9 deferred), Mobile iOS, Vite chunk size optimization, Security audit.

2026-03-04: activity_logs table was missing from PostgreSQL despite alembic_version showing 7c415cc1b77a as applied. Created table + indexes manually via SQL. Caused 500 on /deals/kanban endpoint. 2026-03-04: CI ESLint failures fixed in commit dace76d (unused variables in useDeals.ts, DealsPage.tsx, ExtractionStatusBadge enum).
